footer.paymentNote: You can send donations via the channels below (numbers will be updated soon).
footer.systemNoteBody: Set environment variables to enable Supabase-backed live accounts, receipt verification, and admin APIs (`/api/admin/*`).

hero.title: Hilful Fuzul Manobkallyan Fund
hero.tagline: Donations, transparency, and social welfare — in one place.
hero.imageAlt: Mosque and community — symbol of Hilful Fuzul’s work

stats.donationsNotePending: Updates when live data is connected.

home.bannerAlt: Green nature — symbol of sustainable development and welfare
home.commitmentBody: Every step of donations and expenses will be recorded digitally; the full accounts will be published on the transparency page; digital receipts will be available for manual donations.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: All donations, expenses, and ledger entries will remain open to the public.

activities.title: Activities

notices.title: Notices
notices.description: Meetings, programmes, and important announcements will be published here.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: This page will present the organisation’s goals, vision, governance principles, and core commitments to community development.
about.imageAlt: Nature and community welfare — illustrative image
about.body: The content structure is ready. Next, verified institutional information, governance structure, advisory committee, and organisational history will be added here.

activities.title: Activities
activities.subtitle: Ongoing and planned programmes of the organisation will be published in this section.
activities.bucketNote: Under each category, specific programmes, budget allocations, and progress will be added.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.subtitle: A complete public account of donations and expenses will be published here.
